summary: Completed testing of Product Sourcing feature for Wildly Ones e-commerce app. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified working - product search, filters, import dialog, profit calculator all functional.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Backend: /api/admin/sourcing/search requires authentication (returns 401/403)
Backend: /api/admin/sourcing/categories requires authentication
Backend: /api/admin/sourcing/import requires authentication
Backend: Categories endpoint returns all 7 pet types (all, dog, cat, fish, bird, rabbit, small_pet)
Backend: Categories endpoint returns all 8 product types (all, supplements, food, grooming, toys, beds, accessories, health)
Backend: Categories endpoint returns all 4 suppliers (all, cjdropshipping, zendrop, spocket)
Backend: Search returns products with all required fields (id, name, supplier, costs, margins, features)
Backend: Product margin calculations are correct (margin = retail - landed_cost)
Backend: Filter by pet type working (dog, cat, fish, bird)
Backend: Filter by supplier working (CJdropshipping, Zendrop, Spocket)
Backend: Filter by price range working
Backend: Search with text query working
Backend: Pagination working correctly
Backend: Product import creates product in store catalog
Backend: Import preserves sourcing metadata (supplier, costs, landed_cost)
Backend: End-to-end workflow: search -> filter -> import -> verify in catalog
Frontend: Product Sourcing page loads at /admin/sourcing
Frontend: Admin authentication required and working
Frontend: Search input and button visible and functional
Frontend: Filter toggle expands to show Pet Type, Category, Supplier, Max Cost filters
Frontend: Product cards display supplier badges (color-coded by supplier)
Frontend: Product cards show US warehouse badge
Frontend: Product cards display Cost, Shipping, Landed, Retail prices
Frontend: Product cards show margin % and $ amount
Frontend: Product features/tags displayed on cards
Frontend: Import button opens Import dialog
Frontend: Import dialog shows product preview, name input, price input, description textarea
Frontend: Import dialog shows calculated margin based on price
Frontend: Profit Calculator button opens calculator modal
Frontend: Calculator shows landed cost, gross margin, payment fees, marketing estimate, net profit
Frontend: Supplier filter correctly filters products
critical_code_review_comments: Product sourcing service uses SIMULATED data from suppliers (no real API integration) - documented as MOCKED
Consider adding aria-describedby to Dialog components for better accessibility
seed_data_creation: Test products created and deleted during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Sourcing feature at /admin/sourcing is fully functional. Backend endpoints: POST /api/admin/sourcing/search, GET /api/admin/sourcing/categories, POST /api/admin/sourcing/import. All require admin authentication. Frontend shows product cards from 3 suppliers (CJdropshipping, Zendrop, Spocket) with pricing, margins, and import functionality. Supplier data is MOCKED/SIMULATED. Admin credentials: admin@calmtails.com / admin123

mocked_apis.Supplier Product Search: MOCKED - Returns simulated product catalog data from CJdropshipping, Zendrop, Spocket patterns
mocked_apis.No real supplier API keys: Product data follows realistic patterns but is not fetched from actual supplier APIs

features: Import to store with custom name/price/description

console_warnings: WebSocket connection to wss://...preview.emergentagent.com/ws/admin failed - Expected in preview environment
Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - Minor accessibility issue
